task_name: SSH Auth Log - Failed Login Analysis
notes: Agent produced a well-structured, comprehensive markdown report with correct overall metrics (366 failed passwords, 85 break-in warnings, top invalid usernames, attack assessment). However, top IP counts are significantly off—reported 183.62.140.253 with 149 attempts vs. expected ~307 (off by ~52%). Also reported 187.141.143.180 with 80 vs. expected ~189. Created duplicate markdown files (failed_login_report.md and _1.md) unnecessarily, plus a parser script. Report quality is high with good tables, analysis, and recommendations, but parsing accuracy on IP distribution is notably deficient.
